title: Console Log
description: Use console.log and debugger statements to inspect component state during mobile execution.
problemStatement:
Inspection! Add a `console.log` statement inside your component's body that prints `"Component Rendered"` each time it runs.

**Requirement:** Correctly place the log inside the functional component before the return.
hints: In React Native, `console.log` output appears in your terminal or the remote debugger.
expectedOutput: Debug messages visible in the developer console
